descripcion: A logic issue was addressed with improved checks. This issue is fixed in iOS 18.5 and iPadOS 18.5. An app may be able to enumerate a user's installed apps.
Improper access control in Windows SMB allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.
A vulnerability allowing remote code execution (RCE) for domain users.

telnetd in GNU Inetutils through 2.7 allows remote authentication bypass via a "-f root" value for the USER environment variable.
